DESCRIPTION: Fitness storage module for persisting fitness scores.

This module provides an async interface for saving and retrieving fitness scores using SQLite.

CLASSES:
- FitnessStorage
  Methods: async def initialize(self) -> None
  Methods: async def save_score(self, agent_id: str, score: float, metric_type: str='general_fitness', task_id:
  Methods: async def close(self) -> None
